candidate.question: What are NCT and Author for trials with Name of ICI equal to Atezolizumab?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab';
candidate.parent_question: List the NCT identifier and author for Small Cell Lung cancer trials using Atezolizumab where the overall follow-up was more than 13.7 months?

candidate.question: NCT identifiers for trials where Originial publication or Follow-up equals Follow-up.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';
candidate.parent_question: Find the identifiers and publication status of Phase 3 Atezolizumab trials for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer that are follow-up publications?

candidate.question: What are NCT and Author for trials with Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall greater than 13.7?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 13.7;
candidate.parent_question: List the NCT identifier and author for Small Cell Lung cancer trials using Atezolizumab where the overall follow-up was more than 13.7 months?
